## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to align on content strategy, discuss new initiatives, and review progress for HeyGen's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production ramping up with 20 blogs/week target; traffic expected to increase post-holiday dip](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [New marketing content series focused on AI video generation for marketing approved; potential for e-book](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [LinkedIn ad spend approved for L\&D and marketing personas; opportunity for gated content testing](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Top 30 use cases being defined; content suite (landing pages, blog posts, demos, case studies) to be built around each](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance

  - [Traffic experiencing post-holiday dip; expected to increase with 20 blogs/week publishing schedule](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Recent publication: e-learning e-book (Dec 17)](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Upcoming: Content marketing budget article pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Performance tracking available through provided report link](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### New Marketing Content Series

  - [Focus: AI video generation for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Topics: Content marketing budget, brand engagement, AI video ads](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Strategy: Create pillar post or e-book linking 8 articles](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Themes: AI video personalization, localization, advertisement optimization](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Goal: Optimize content marketing budgets with AI video generation](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### Lead Generation Strategy

  - [Current approach: Ungated content to encourage direct meeting bookings](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Proposal: Test lead capture mechanisms within content](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Potential use: Webinar invitations, nurturing B2B audience](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### LinkedIn Ad Campaign

  - [Budget approved for L\&D and marketing personas](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Targeting: Retargeting website visitors, manager+ roles in L\&D and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Content types: Gated content downloads, boosted social posts](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Opportunity: Repackage existing content for LinkedIn audience](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### Top 30 Use Cases Initiative

  - [Defining top 30 use cases across business and product](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Plan: Build content suite for each use case (landing pages, how-to articles, demo videos, case studies, blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Themes likely to include marketing, L\&D, and localization](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [SEO strategy to be built around top 4-5 use cases](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### Content Repurposing Workflow

  - [Create new workflows for repurposing content (e.g., webinar to blog, video to written asset)](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve on competitors' strategies (e.g., VEED IO)](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

### Micro-Influencer Program

  - [Distinction between proactive influencer program and reactive affiliate program](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Proposal: Simplify process with copy-paste ask for influencers](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Potential strategy: Use phantom buster or LinkedIn search to identify and reach out to micro-influencers](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

### Programmatic Content Generation

  - [API capability ready for generating videos based on blog content](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic image generation for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Temporary use of stock images approved to maintain publishing pace](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to provide timeline for marketing content series articles and e-book](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
  - [Holly to share finalized list of top 30 use cases by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Team to begin planning content suite around top use cases](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Explore lead capture mechanisms within content for testing](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Develop simplified outreach process for micro-influencer program](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Follow up on programmatic image generation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/wvthvbAcuRfruWabXiJaJy7r2iPsS5sP?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
